parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ type: 'weekly_digest', topic: 'weekly_operations_summary', content: $json.title + '\n\n' + $json.digest, importance: 7, source: 'n8n_weekly_digest', metadata: { alert_count: $json.alert_count, critical_count: $json.critical_count, github_entries: $json.github_entries } }) }}
